description: Use the N/currentRecord module to access the record that is active in the current client context. This module is always a dynamic object and mode of work is always dynamic, not deferred dynamic/standard.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a record object that represents the current record.

methods.name: get.promise
methods.description: Retrieves a promise for an object that represents the current record.

objectTypes.name: CurrentRecord
objectTypes.description: Represents the record active on the current page. Has the same methods as record.Record plus additional client-side methods.

methods.name: cancelLine
methods.description: Cancels the changes made to the currently selected line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: commitLine
methods.description: Commits the currently selected line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: executeMacro
methods.description: Performs macro operation and returns its result in a plain JavaScript object.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The macro ID.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Macro parameters.

methods.name: executeMacro.promise
methods.description: Performs macro operation asynchronously and returns its result in a plain JavaScript object.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The macro ID.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Macro parameters.

methods.name: findMatrixSublistLineWithValue
methods.description: Returns the line number of the first line that contains the specified value in the matrix column.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist that contains the matrix.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the matrix field.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column number for the matrix field.

params.name: options.value
params.description: The value to search for.

methods.name: findSublistLineWithValue
methods.description: Gets the line number for the first occurrence of a field value in a sublist.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

params.name: options.value
params.description: The value to search for.

methods.name: getCurrentMatrixSublistValue
methods.description: Gets the value for the currently selected line in the matrix.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist that contains the matrix.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the matrix field.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column number for the matrix field.

methods.name: getCurrentSublistIndex
methods.description: Gets the line number of the currently selected line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: getCurrentSublistSubrecord
methods.description: Gets the subrecord for the associated sublist field on the current line. The subrecord object is retrieved in view mode.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

methods.name: getCurrentSublistText
methods.description: Gets the value of the field in the currently selected line by text representation.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: getCurrentSublistValue
methods.description: Gets the value of the field in the currently selected line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: getField
methods.description: Gets a field object from the record.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: getFields
methods.description: Returns the body field names (internal IDs) of all the fields in the record, including machine header field and matrix header fields.

methods.name: getLineCount
methods.description: Returns the number of lines in the sublist.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: getMatrixHeaderCount
methods.description: Returns the number of columns for the specified matrix.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist that contains the matrix.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the matrix field.

methods.name: getMatrixHeaderField
methods.description: Gets the field for the specified header in the matrix.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist that contains the matrix.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the matrix field.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column number for the matrix field.

methods.name: getMatrixHeaderValue
methods.description: Gets the value for the associated header in the matrix.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist that contains the matrix.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the matrix field.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column number for the matrix field.

methods.name: getMatrixSublistField
methods.description: Gets the field for the specified sublist in the matrix.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist that contains the matrix.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the matrix field.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number for the matrix field.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column number for the matrix field.

methods.name: getMatrixSublistValue
methods.description: Gets the value for the associated field in the matrix.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the matrix field.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number for the matrix field.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column number for the matrix field.

methods.name: getMacro
methods.description: Provides a macro to execute.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The macro ID.

methods.name: getMacros
methods.description: Provides a plain JavaScript object that contains macro objects defined for a record type, indexed by the Macro ID.

methods.name: getSublist
methods.description: Gets the specified sublist object.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: getSublistField
methods.description: Gets the specified field object from the sublist.

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number.

methods.name: getSublistFields

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: getSublistSubrecord
methods.description: Gets the subrecord associated with a sublist field. (standard mode only)

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number for the sublist field.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

params.name: options.line

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

params.name: options.line

methods.name: getSubrecord
methods.description: Gets the subrecord associated with the field. The subrecord object is retrieved in view mode.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: getText
methods.description: Gets the value of the field by a string representation.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Gets the value of the field. Not to be used on custom password fields. Use crypto.checkPasswordField(options) instead.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: hasCurrentSublistSubrecord
methods.description: Returns a value indicating whether the associated sublist field has a subrecord on the current line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

methods.name: hasSublistSubrecord

params.name: options.sublistId

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

params.name: options.line

methods.name: hasSubrecord
methods.description: Indicates whether the field has a subrecord.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: insertLine
methods.description: Inserts a new line in a sublist.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line at which to insert a sublist line.

params.name: options.ignoreRecalc
params.description: If set to true, the formula fields are not recalculated after the line is inserted.

methods.name: removeCurrentSublistSubrecord
methods.description: Removes the subrecord for the associated sublist field on the current line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

methods.name: removeLine
methods.description: Removes a line from a sublist.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number.

params.name: options.ignoreRecalc
params.description: If set to true, the formula fields are not recalculated after the line is removed.

methods.name: removeSublistSubrecord
methods.description: Removes the subrecord for the associated sublist field. (standard mode only)

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number.

methods.name: removeSubrecord
methods.description: Removes the subrecord associated with the field.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Submits a new record or saves edits to an existing record.

params.name: options.enableSourcing
params.description: If set to true, body and sublist fields with source from will be sourced when the record is saved.

params.name: options.ignoreMandatoryFields
params.description: If set to true, mandatory field validation is ignored when the record is submitted.

methods.name: save.promise
methods.description: Submits a new record asynchronously or saves edits to an existing record asynchronously.

params.name: options.enableSourcing
params.description: If set to true, body and sublist fields with source from will be sourced when the record is saved.

params.name: options.ignoreMandatoryFields
params.description: If set to true, mandatory field validation is ignored when the record is submitted.

methods.name: selectLine
methods.description: Selects a line item in a sublist.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number.

methods.name: selectNewLine
methods.description: Selects a new line at the end of the sublist.

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.ignoreFieldChange
params.description: Set to true to ignore the field change script.
